description: List of contributions, calligraphically written. With Greek/Coptic numerals. 32 names are preserved, of the type common among Jews at the end of the Middle Ages (ca. 13th–14th century), such as Naṣrallāh (twice), ʿAbd al-Karīm, Khiḍr, ʿAbd al-ʿAzīz, ʿAbd al-Wāḥid. (Information in part from Mediterranean Society, II, pp. 505-506, App. C 130.)
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בGreek/Coptic Numerals, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
